title: Channel Model Turn Baseline
objective: Install the deterministic Kova channel, prove every shared OpenClaw channel capability, then run an aggregate real agent/model turn matrix through the mock provider and verify channel sends, receipts, timing, and duplicate/terminal invariants.

phases.title: Provision Channel Model Turn Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment without starting the gateway so Kova mock auth and the test channel plugin are installed before plugin discovery.

phases.title: Install Kova Channel Plugin
phases.intent: Install the deterministic Kova channel plugin through the user-visible plugin install path before gateway startup.

phases.title: Start Gateway With Kova Channel
phases.intent: Start the OpenClaw gateway after mock auth and plugin installation so the channel and model provider are discovered through the normal runtime path.

phases.title: Run Durable Final Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw proves durable final channel capabilities before model-turn testing.

phases.title: Run Live Preview Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw proves live preview capability behavior before model-turn testing.

phases.title: Run Live Finalizer Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw proves live finalizer capability behavior before model-turn testing.

phases.title: Run Ack Capability Baseline
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw proves receive acknowledgement policy behavior before model-turn testing.

phases.title: Run Channel Model Turn Matrix
phases.intent: Call the Kova channel plugin over Gateway RPC so OpenClaw handles multiple real inbound channel events, calls the mock provider for each model-turn case, sends final assistant responses through the channel adapter, and records capability lineage invariants.
commands: node {kovaRoot}/support/run-channel-model-turn-baseline.mjs --env {env} --artifact-dir {artifactDir} --message 'Reply with exact ASCII text KOVA_AGENT_OK only.' --expected-text KOVA_AGENT_OK --skip-shared-baseline true --timeout-ms 120000

phases.title: Post-Channel-Model-Turn Health
phases.intent: Verify the gateway remains responsive after the channel model turn.
